# Legacy "flow_grpo" env — used only by `eval_metrics_split.sh` to compute the
# three reference T2I scores (ImageReward + CLIPScore + LAION aesthetic).
# Kept separate because ImageReward pins old transformers / CLIP and clashes
# with the BoxFlow-GRPO training env.

torch==2.1.2
torchvision==0.16.2
transformers==4.40.2
diffusers==0.27.2
ftfy==6.2.0

# scoring models
image-reward==1.5
git+https://github.com/openai/CLIP.git@dcba3cb2e2827b402d2701e7e1c7d9fed8a20ef1#egg=clip

# numerics + utils
Pillow==10.4.0
numpy==1.26.4
tqdm==4.66.5
